reason: The candidate preserved output behavior but regressed the benchmark; per-row PyO3 iterator crossings were more expensive than building the throwaway outer dict.

isomorphism_notes.ordering: Golden adjacency serialization preserved node and neighbor order.
isomorphism_notes.tie_breaking: No algorithmic tie-breaking path was changed.
isomorphism_notes.floating_point: No floating-point computation path was changed.
isomorphism_notes.rng: The benchmark graph construction uses fixed seed=0; no RNG path was changed.
isomorphism_notes.mutation_contract: Candidate retained the existing FrankenNetworkX row-copy isolation behavior for returned adjacency rows.
